mapper.select: SELECT efficiency FROM solar_log ORDER BY log_id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alert_log (location, efficiency, message, status) VALUES (#{location}, #{efficiency}, #{message}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM alert_log ORDER BY alert_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE alert_log SET status = #{status} WHERE alert_id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT location FROM inverter_info WHERE inverter_id = #{inverterId}
